creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text: That's not how this works. We don't have the spacenav stuff in the ports tree (and I have neither time nor a spacemouse). Even if we had, "just picking things up" is a rather bad thing to do - it doesn't properly register dependencies, for starters. And we wouldn't want to force spacenav stuff on unsuspecting users - I'd classify the spacemouse and similar devices as "somewhat exotic"- so this would have to be properly optionized.
